_meta.user_decision_2026_05_04: Keep list_price=$7.99 during W1 testing. Will raise price after ads prove velocity. Budget tweaked to $15/day ($105/week) with reduced bids to cap bleed at ~$80-120 for W1.

_bid_math.theoretical_max_cpc_note: Formula max_cpc = royalty * (target_acos/100) * (cvr/100) yields $0.055 at 8% cvr. This is FAR below Amazon market rates for sudoku keywords ($0.40-$0.90). Pure formula bid would never win impressions.
_bid_math.actual_strategy_rationale: We override the formula floor because Amazon Ads is a 2nd-price auction; bidding $0.05 = zero impressions = zero data. Launch week 1 we accept losing money per click to GATHER DATA, then prune by week 2-3. Real CPC paid will be ~60-70% of bid ($0.27-$0.32 avg). Acceptable launch loss = 1-2 weeks of $15-20/day = $100-280 total invested in keyword discovery + ranking signals.

campaigns.name: SP_ExactMatch_LargePrintSudoku_Launch_W1
campaigns.rationale: High-intent buyer keywords. Tight match = high CVR, low ACoS. Fixed bid (no Amazon up-bid) for week 1 to control spend. No placement modifier — we want raw baseline data first.
keywords_exact: extra large print sudoku puzzle book

campaigns.name: SP_BroadDiscovery_SudokuSeniors_Launch_W1
campaigns.rationale: Mining campaign — broad match captures long-tail variants we haven't predicted (gift, holiday, vision condition modifiers). Lower bid (0.7x exact) because broader = lower CVR. 'down_only' bidding lets Amazon cut bid on low-converting clicks. Search term report at day 7 → harvest converters to Exact, add losers to negatives.

campaigns.name: SP_Auto_Discovery_Launch_W1
campaigns.rationale: Lowest-effort discovery. Amazon's algorithm finds ASIN + keyword targets we'd miss. Lowest bid (0.5x exact) because zero relevance signal. Primary purpose: feed search-term report. Substitutes (competitor ASINs) get same bid as close_match — high-intent shoppers comparing similar books.

_totals.note_royalty_at_799: royalty $2.80/sale → break-even ACoS 35% — high ACoS W1 expected because price kept low for testing

kpis_to_track: organic_rank_for_top_3_keywords (track via manual SERP check d1/d4/d7)
do_not_panic_about: Zero conversions on some keywords (expected — need 100+ clicks before judging)
Auto campaign spending all budget (it should — that's the discovery engine)
iterate_d7_actions: Pause exact keywords with >40 clicks and 0 orders
Harvest search-term-report converters from Broad → add to Exact
Add high-impression / zero-click search terms to negatives
If any keyword has ACoS < 25% and >3 orders → raise bid 20%

_critical_warnings.details: DB says $7.99 → 50% royalty tier → $2.80/sale. bookinfo.md JSON says $9.99 → 60% royalty → ~$4.55/sale. Recommend RAISE to $9.99 on KDP before ads launch — instantly +62% royalty, makes ads viable.
Formula max_cpc = $0.055 but real-world bids needed = $0.28-$0.55. Week 1 will run negative-margin to gather data. Acceptable IF user understands launch is investment, not profit phase.
Book published today (2026-05-04) — likely 0 reviews. CTR will be 30-50% lower than fully-reviewed listing. Expected. Will improve as reviews accumulate.
_critical_warnings.action_required: Optional — enroll in Amazon Vine if ASIN is eligible

_next_action_after_user_approval.db_writes_pending: 3 rows to ad_campaigns table after Amazon API confirms campaign IDs
